title: Corpus test: trailing newline fix (Go grouped declarations root cause)
description: Root cause of 'Go grouped declarations' failures and ~120 other corpus failures across all languages. The corpus test infrastructure (corpustest.go ParseCorpusFile) was stripping ALL trailing newlines from test input via bytes.TrimRight, but tree-sitter parsers (especially Go, which uses newlines for semicolon insertion) require a trailing newline to parse correctly. Fix: re-append a single \n after TrimRight. Impact: Go 25→55/67, Python ~72→92/116, JS ~46→98/117, TS ~15→104/113, Lua 7→26/38. Committed 46224f8 on fix/go-grouped-declarations.
